data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that such a policy is implemented or enforced in the system. The linked use case describes a scenario where SMS is blocked due to quiet hours, but it does not provide specific evidence of the fallback mechanism being operational or tested, indicating a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fallback channel policy.
